Package com.audiodo.aspen

Class IAudiodoTransparencyCapability

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.audiodo.aspen.IObservableProperty
      • com.audiodo.aspen.IAudiodoTransparencyCapability
  • public class IAudiodoTransparencyCapability
extends IObservableProperty
    The Audiodo Transparency capability

    This class is an interface to the Audiodo transparency capability
    available on a IDeviceService. It can be used to configure the
    Audiodo transparency. It does not however control the state of the
    transparency, see IAncCapability for that.

    On session established the capability will start a synchronize process
    with the remote device. During this time most of the API calls will be
    blocked. When sync is complete the observer event
    get_observable_event_sync_complete will be sent.

    • Nested Class Summary

      Modifier and Type Class Description
      static class  IAudiodoTransparencyCapability.NalNl2Data
      The NalNl2Data class.

      The class holds relevant data needed for the NalNl2 library.

      static java.lang.String getObservableEventSetTypeAnsi3222014FogConfirmation()
      NOT TO BE USED FOR ANYTHING OTHER THAN LAB TESTS FOR ANSI3.22:2014

      Confirmation from device that the ANSI3.22:2014 FOG transparency type has been set

      Observers will be notified with this event when the remote device has confirmed a
      set_type_ansi3_22_2014_fog request.
      static java.lang.String getObservableEventSetTypeAnsi3222014RtsConfirmation()
      NOT TO BE USED FOR ANYTHING OTHER THAN LAB TESTS FOR ANSI3.22:2014

      Confirmation from device that the ANSI3.22:2014 RTS transparency type has been set

      Observers will be notified with this event when the remote device has confirmed a
      set_type_ansi3_22_2014_rts request.
      static java.lang.String getObservableEventSetTypeAudiodoConfirmation()
      Confirmation from device that the Audiodo personalization transparency type has been set

      Observers will be notified with this event when the remote device has confirmed a
      set_type_audiodo request.
      static java.lang.String getObservableEventSetTypeGenericConfirmation()
      Confirmation from device that the Generic transparency type has been set

      Observers will be notified with this event when the remote device has confirmed a
      set_type_generic request.
      static java.lang.String getObservableEventSetTypeNalNl2Confirmation()
      Confirmation from device that the NAL-NL2 personalization transparency type has been set

      Observers will be notified with this event when the remote device has confirmed a
      set_type_nal_nl2 request.

      Notification that the capability is in sync with device

      On session establish the transparency capability will synchronize with the remote
      device.
      boolean isFeedbackSuppressionActivated()
      Check if feedback suppression is active

      Note: Ensure device is in sync before using this API.
      boolean isNoiseSuppressionLockedToGain()
      Check if the noise suppression value is currently being locked to the gain

      Note: This function requires a license.
      boolean isNoiseSuppressionLockedToGainSupported()
      Check if the device supports locking noise suppression value to the gain

      Note: This function requires a license.
      boolean isNoiseSuppressorActivated()
      Check if noise suppressor is active

      Note: Ensure device is in sync before using this API.
      boolean isPersonalizationActivated()
      Check if personalization is activated, i.e.
      boolean isTransparencyTypeSupported​(AudiodoTransparencyType type)
      Check if the AudiodoTransparencyType is supported.
      boolean remoteDeviceInSync()
      Check if the capability is in sync with the audio device.
      boolean reset​(boolean resetPersonalization)
      Reset the transparency config

      Note: Requires an active session with an audio device.

      Resets the transparency configuration to its default values.
      Observers will be notified with event get_observable_event_configure_confirmation if any changes
      occurred.
      boolean resetExtraApis()
      Resets the extra API back to the default configuration

      The extra apis include toggling noise_suppressor, toggling feedback_suppression, set max noise
      reduction and set feedback suppression mode.

      Observers will be notified with multiple events of type get_observable_event_extra_api_set_confirmation
      when the change has been confirmed by the remote device.
      boolean setFeedbackSuppressionMode​(AudiodoTransparencyFeedbackSuppressionMode mode)
      Set Feedback Suppression Mode

      Note: This function requires a license.
      void setGain​(int gain)
      Set a gain

      An asynchronous request to set a gain value in dB for the transparency.
      boolean setIsNoiseSuppressionLockedToGain​(boolean lock)
      Lock and unlock the noise suppression value to the gain

      Note: This function requires a license.
      boolean setMaxNoiseReduction​(long value)
      Set max noise reduction

      Note: This function requires a license.
      void setTypeAudiodo​(AudiodoTransparencyMode mode, java.lang.String profile_id)
      Set Audiodo personalization transparency type

      An asynchronous request to set Audiodo personalization transparency type.

      It will use the profile to perform personal sound compensation
      on the transparency audio.

      When enabling Audiodo personalization, the gain ranges may update as there is typically
      a lower maximum gain allowance while a personalization is in effect.
      void setTypeGeneric​(AudiodoTransparencyMode mode)
      Set Generic transparency type

      An asynchronous request to set Generic transparency type.

      Observers will be notified with event get_observable_event_set_type_generic_confirmation
      when the change has been confirmed by the remote device.
      void setTypeNalNl2​(AudiodoTransparencyMode mode, IAudiodoTransparencyCapability.NalNl2Data nalNl2Data, android.content.Context applicationContext)
      Set NAL-NL2 personalization transparency type

      An asynchronous request to set NAL-NL2 personalization transparency type.

      • setTypeNalNl2

        public void setTypeNalNl2​(AudiodoTransparencyMode mode,
                          IAudiodoTransparencyCapability.NalNl2Data nalNl2Data,
                          android.content.Context applicationContext)
        Set NAL-NL2 personalization transparency type

        An asynchronous request to set NAL-NL2 personalization transparency type. It will use the
        profile with the matching profile id in the NalNl2Data object that is passed in to
        this function. If the profile is not found, nothing will happen.

        Observers will be notified with event get_observable_event_set_type_nal_nl2_confirmation
        when the change has been confirmed by the remote device.
        Parameters:
        mode - The transparency mode to use
        nalNl2Data - A NalNl2Data object containing needed meta data.
        applicationContext - The application context.

      • setTypeAudiodo

        public void setTypeAudiodo​(AudiodoTransparencyMode mode,
                           java.lang.String profile_id)
        Set Audiodo personalization transparency type

        An asynchronous request to set Audiodo personalization transparency type.

        It will use the profile to perform personal sound compensation
        on the transparency audio.

        When enabling Audiodo personalization, the gain ranges may update as there is typically
        a lower maximum gain allowance while a personalization is in effect. This may
        trigger a clamping of the set gain, which in turn will trigger a separate
        observable event. See the set_gain documentation for details on this event.

        Observers will be notified with event get_observable_event_set_type_audiodo_confirmation
        when the change has been confirmed by the remote device.

        Parameters:
        mode - The transparency mode to use
        profile_id - The ID of the profile to use for personalization

      • setTypeGeneric

        public void setTypeGeneric​(AudiodoTransparencyMode mode)
        Set Generic transparency type

        An asynchronous request to set Generic transparency type.

        Observers will be notified with event get_observable_event_set_type_generic_confirmation
        when the change has been confirmed by the remote device.

        Parameters:
        mode - The transparency mode to use

      • isPersonalizationActivated

        public boolean isPersonalizationActivated()
        Check if personalization is activated, i.e. transparency type is not Generic.

        Returns:
        True if it is activated, false if it is deactivated.

      • isTransparencyTypeSupported

        public boolean isTransparencyTypeSupported​(AudiodoTransparencyType type)
        Check if the AudiodoTransparencyType is supported.

        Returns:
        True if it is supported, false otherwise.

      • getCurrentTransparencyType

        public AudiodoTransparencyType getCurrentTransparencyType()
        Get the currently active transparency type.

        Returns:
        AudiodoTransparencyType Returns the currently active transparency type.

      • setGain

        public void setGain​(int gain)
        Set a gain

        An asynchronous request to set a gain value in dB for the transparency. The
        value will be clamped between get_min_gain and get_max_gain.

        Observers will be notified with event get_observable_event_configure_confirmation
        when the change has been confirmed by the remote device.

        Parameters:
        gain - The gain value in dB, allowed range is from get_min_gain to get_max_gain

      • getGain

        public int getGain()
        Get the gain setting

        Note: Returns 0 if the device is not in sync yet.

        Returns:
        The gain value in dB

      • getMaxGain

        public int getMaxGain()
        Get the max gain

        Returns:
        The max gain value in dB

      • getMinGain

        public int getMinGain()
        Get the min gain

        Returns:
        The min gain value in dB

      • getMode

        public AudiodoTransparencyMode getMode()
        Get the mode setting

        Note: Ensure device is in sync before using this API.

        Returns:
        The mode

      • isNoiseSuppressorActivated

        public boolean isNoiseSuppressorActivated()
        Check if noise suppressor is active

        Note: Ensure device is in sync before using this API.

        Returns:
        True if it is activated, false otherwise

      • isFeedbackSuppressionActivated

        public boolean isFeedbackSuppressionActivated()
        Check if feedback suppression is active

        Note: Ensure device is in sync before using this API.

        Returns:
        True if it is activated, false otherwise

      • getNoiseSuppressorMaxReduction

        public long getNoiseSuppressorMaxReduction()
        Get the maximum noise reduction for the noise suppressor

        Note: Ensure device is in sync before using this API.

        Returns:
        maximum noise reduction in dB

      • getFeedbackSuppressionMode

        public AudiodoTransparencyFeedbackSuppressionMode getFeedbackSuppressionMode()
        Get the feedback suppression mode

        Note: Ensure device is in sync before using this API.

        Returns:
        feedback suppression mode

      • activateFeedbackSuppression

        public boolean activateFeedbackSuppression()
        Activate Feedback Suppression

        Note: This function requires a license. If there is no license, the function will return false.

        Observers will be notified with event get_observable_event_extra_api_set_confirmation
        when the change has been confirmed by the remote device.

        Note: Changing the transparency type with a new mode will automatically update this parameter
        back to the default value for that specific mode.

        Returns:
        True if feedback suppression was activated, false otherwise.

      • deactivateFeedbackSuppression

        public boolean deactivateFeedbackSuppression()
        Deactivate Feedback Suppression

        Note: This function requires a license. If there is no license, the function will return false.

        Observers will be notified with event get_observable_event_extra_api_set_confirmation
        when the change has been confirmed by the remote device.

        Note: Changing the transparency type with a new mode will automatically update this parameter
        back to the default value for that specific mode.

        Returns:
        True if feedback suppression was deactivated, false otherwise.

      • activateNoiseSuppressor

        public boolean activateNoiseSuppressor()
        Activate Noise Suppressor

        Note: This function requires a license. If there is no license, the function will return false.

        Observers will be notified with event get_observable_event_extra_api_set_confirmation
        when the change has been confirmed by the remote device.

        Note: Changing the transparency type with a new mode will automatically update this parameter
        back to the default value for that specific mode.

        Returns:
        True if noise suppressor was activated, false otherwise.

      • deactivateNoiseSuppressor

        public boolean deactivateNoiseSuppressor()
        Deactivate Noise Suppressor

        Note: This function requires a license. If there is no license, the function will return false.

        Observers will be notified with event get_observable_event_extra_api_set_confirmation
        when the change has been confirmed by the remote device.

        Note: Changing the transparency type with a new mode will automatically update this parameter
        back to the default value for that specific mode.

        Returns:
        True if noise suppressor was deactivated, false otherwise.

      • setMaxNoiseReduction

        public boolean setMaxNoiseReduction​(long value)
        Set max noise reduction

        Note: This function requires a license. If there is no license, the function will return false.

        Parameters:
        value - the max noise reduction in dB

        Observers will be notified with event get_observable_event_extra_api_set_confirmation
        when the change has been confirmed by the remote device.

        Note: Changing the transparency type with a new mode will automatically update this parameter
        back to the default value for that specific mode.

        Returns:
        True if max noise reduction was successfully updated, false otherwise.

      • setFeedbackSuppressionMode

        public boolean setFeedbackSuppressionMode​(AudiodoTransparencyFeedbackSuppressionMode mode)
        Set Feedback Suppression Mode

        Note: This function requires a license. If there is no license, the function will return false.

        Parameters:
        mode - The mode to set

        Observers will be notified with event get_observable_event_extra_api_set_confirmation
        when the change has been confirmed by the remote device.

        Note: Changing the transparency type with a new mode will automatically update this parameter
        back to the default value for that specific mode.

        Returns:
        True if feedback suppression mode was successfully updated, false otherwise.

      • isNoiseSuppressionLockedToGainSupported

        public boolean isNoiseSuppressionLockedToGainSupported()
        Check if the device supports locking noise suppression value to the gain

        Note: This function requires a license. If there is no license, the function will return false.

        Use this method to check if the device supports locking the noise suppression value to the gain value.

        Returns:
        True if device supports locking the noise suppression configuration to the gain, false otherwise.

      • setIsNoiseSuppressionLockedToGain

        public boolean setIsNoiseSuppressionLockedToGain​(boolean lock)
        Lock and unlock the noise suppression value to the gain

        Note: This function requires a license. If there is no license, the function will return false.

        Use this method to lock and unlock the noise suppression value to the gain. When locked the noise
        suppression value will change automatically when the gain is changed according to the following table:

        Gain | Noise Suppression
        --------- | -----------------
        -12 | 2
        -11..-9 | 3
        -8..-6 | 4
        -5..-3 | 5
        -2..2 | 6
        3..5 | 7
        6..8 | 8
        9..11 | 9
        12..25 | 10

        Returns:
        True if the noise suppression was locked to the gain, False otherwise

      • isNoiseSuppressionLockedToGain

        public boolean isNoiseSuppressionLockedToGain()
        Check if the noise suppression value is currently being locked to the gain

        Note: This function requires a license. If there is no license, the function will return false.

        Returns:
        True if the noise suppression is currently being locked to the gain, false otherwise.

      • resetExtraApis

        public boolean resetExtraApis()
        Resets the extra API back to the default configuration

        The extra apis include toggling noise_suppressor, toggling feedback_suppression, set max noise
        reduction and set feedback suppression mode.

        Observers will be notified with multiple events of type get_observable_event_extra_api_set_confirmation
        when the change has been confirmed by the remote device.

        Returns:
        True if it was successfully reset, false otherwise.

      • reset

        public boolean reset​(boolean resetPersonalization)
        Reset the transparency config

        Note: Requires an active session with an audio device.

        Resets the transparency configuration to its default values.
        Observers will be notified with event get_observable_event_configure_confirmation if any changes
        occurred.

        Parameters:
        resetPersonalization - If true, the personalization setting is also reset to generic, otherwise
        it is left as is.
        Returns:
        True if configuration was successfully reset, false otherwise.

      • remoteDeviceInSync

        public boolean remoteDeviceInSync()
        Check if the capability is in sync with the audio device.

        Returns:
        True if it is in sync, false if not in sync.

      • getObservableEventSyncComplete

        public static java.lang.String getObservableEventSyncComplete()
        Notification that the capability is in sync with device

        On session establish the transparency capability will synchronize with the remote
        device. On completion the observers will be notified with this event. The subject
        parameter is not used for this event.

        Returns:
        A string that identifies the event.

      • getObservableEventSetTypeAudiodoConfirmation

        public static java.lang.String getObservableEventSetTypeAudiodoConfirmation()
        Confirmation from device that the Audiodo personalization transparency type has been set

        Observers will be notified with this event when the remote device has confirmed a
        set_type_audiodo request. The subject parameter is not used for this event.

        Returns:
        A string that identifies the event.

      • getObservableEventSetTypeGenericConfirmation

        public static java.lang.String getObservableEventSetTypeGenericConfirmation()
        Confirmation from device that the Generic transparency type has been set

        Observers will be notified with this event when the remote device has confirmed a
        set_type_generic request. The subject parameter is not used for this event.

        Returns:
        A string that identifies the event.

      • getObservableEventConfigureConfirmation

        public static java.lang.String getObservableEventConfigureConfirmation()
        Confirmation from device that the a configuration was set

        Observers will be notified with this event when the remote device has confirmed a
        set_gain request. The subject parameter is not used for this event.

        Returns:
        A string that identifies the event.

      • getObservableEventExtraApiSetConfirmation

        public static java.lang.String getObservableEventExtraApiSetConfirmation()
        Confirmation for a configuration set using the extra apis

        Returns:
        A string that identifies the event.

      • getObservableEventSetTypeNalNl2Confirmation

        public static java.lang.String getObservableEventSetTypeNalNl2Confirmation()
        Confirmation from device that the NAL-NL2 personalization transparency type has been set

        Observers will be notified with this event when the remote device has confirmed a
        set_type_nal_nl2 request. The subject parameter is not used for this event.

        Returns:
        A string that identifies the event.

      • getObservableEventSetTypeAnsi3222014FogConfirmation

        public static java.lang.String getObservableEventSetTypeAnsi3222014FogConfirmation()
        NOT TO BE USED FOR ANYTHING OTHER THAN LAB TESTS FOR ANSI3.22:2014

        Confirmation from device that the ANSI3.22:2014 FOG transparency type has been set

        Observers will be notified with this event when the remote device has confirmed a
        set_type_ansi3_22_2014_fog request. The subject parameter is not used for this event.

        Returns:

      • getObservableEventSetTypeAnsi3222014RtsConfirmation

        public static java.lang.String getObservableEventSetTypeAnsi3222014RtsConfirmation()
        NOT TO BE USED FOR ANYTHING OTHER THAN LAB TESTS FOR ANSI3.22:2014

        Confirmation from device that the ANSI3.22:2014 RTS transparency type has been set

        Observers will be notified with this event when the remote device has confirmed a
        set_type_ansi3_22_2014_rts request. The subject parameter is not used for this event.

        Returns:
        A string that identifies the event.
